Name: Disqualifying_Properties
Description: A list of **NodeProperty** key:value pairs that causes the intervention not to be distributed to the node or aborted (stopped before it could be applied). See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information.

Name: Dont_Allow_Duplicates
Description: If a node's container has an intervention, set to true (1) to prevent it from receiving another copy of the intervention. Supported by all intervention classes.

Name: Intervention_Name
Description: The optional name used to refer to this intervention as a means to differentiate it from others that use the same class.

Name: New_Property_Value
Description: An optional **NodeProperty** key:value pair that will be assigned when the intervention is applied. See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information.

Name: Overriding_Condom_Usage_Probability
Description: The new sigmoid to use when determining the probability that a condom is used during a coital act within the specified relationship type. This overrides the **Condom_Usage_Probablility** for the relationship type as defined in the Demographics file.

Name: Relationship_Type
Description:
Change the behavior of the relationships for this type of relationship in this node. Possible values are:

* TRANSITORY
* INFORMAL
* MARITAL
* COMMERCIAL
